conversation_os_enabled.description: Master kill switch for the Intelligent Conversation OS. Set false to disable all ConversationOS features instantly.

conversation_summaries_enabled.description: Enable AI summary generation for spaces. Enable for staff only in Phase 2; general users in Phase 5.

catch_up_recaps_enabled.description: Show the catch-up recap banner and sheet when users have unread messages.

action_extraction_enabled.description: Enable action item and decision extraction from threads (Phase 3).

organizational_memory_enabled.description: Enable org-level weekly memory persistence and query (Phase 4).

ambient_conversation_intelligence_enable.description: Show the ambient top banner with catch-up / topic / action chips.

conversation_os_liquid_glass_enabled.description: Enable Liquid Glass rendering for ConversationOS cards (Phase 5).

conversation_os_debug_telemetry_enabled.description: Enable verbose debug telemetry for ConversationOS (staff/QA only).

conversation_os_sensitive_space_restrict.description: Block AI access to prayer_room, leadership_room, and admin_channel unless explicitly opted in. MUST default true.

find_a_church.description: Phase 1 master-run: Find a Church — MapKit map, clustering, filter chips, bottom sheet. Enable only after churchSearchProxy CF is wired with real Algolia data.

posts_liquid_glass.description: Phase 2 master-run: Posts Liquid Glass migration — switches Posts surfaces to AmenGlassKit components.

why_seeing_this.description: Phase 3 master-run: 'Why this is in your feed' provenance disclosure sheet + agency actions. Enable after postProvenanceProxy CF is wired with real Intelligence Engine data.

selah_stories.description: Phase 5 master-run: Selah Stories free composer — ephemeral formation stories with private audience only. Enable after selahStoryProxy CF CRUD is wired.

selah_stories_premium_ai.description: Phase 5 master-run: Selah Stories premium AI features (subscription-gated) — verse recognition, Berean reflection prompts, semantic audio matching. Enable only after Vertex AI Vision + Pinecone are provisioned in Firebase Secret Manager.

version.description: Master Run 2026-05-31 — Find a Church, Posts Glass, Provenance, Selah Stories (all OFF)
